html:
2026-0290
2026-03-30ISCIndian ActAdministration and Control of Reserve Land Pheasant Rump Nakota Indian Reserve No. 68 and 68B, Saskatchewan ** Transfer **Order consenting and authorizing the transfer of administration and control of lands in a Pheasant Rump Nakota Indian Reserve No. 68 and 68B, in Saskatchewan, for the purposes of constructing, operating and maintaining a provincial public highway and works for public utility.N/A
subject: Administration and Control of Reserve Land Pheasant Rump Nakota Indian Reserve No. 68 and 68B, Saskatchewan ** Transfer **
precis: Order consenting and authorizing the transfer of administration and control of lands in a Pheasant Rump Nakota Indian Reserve No. 68 and 68B, in Saskatchewan, for the purposes of constructing, operating and maintaining a provincial public highway and works for public utility.
